name: Power Consumption Estimator
description: Estimate drone power consumption based on motor specifications and thrust.
formulaDescription: Power consumption is calculated as voltage multiplied by current draw at the specified thrust level.

example.explanation: At 50% thrust with 20A current draw on a 14.8V battery, power consumption is 296 W.

faqs.question: How do I know the current draw?
faqs.answer: Use a battery monitor or current meter during test flights. Most drone ESCs log this data.

faqs.question: Why does thrust percentage matter?
faqs.answer: Current draw varies non-linearly with thrust. Hover typically requires 30-50% thrust, full throttle requires 100%.
